items.name: Kerala Chicken Biriyani
items.description: Tender chicken pieces marinated in spices, cooked with fragrant basmati rice, garnished with fried onions, cashews, almonds, and fresh herbs.
items.simplified_description: A flavorful rice dish with marinated chicken and various toppings.

items.name: Beef Ullarthiyathu
items.description: Succulent beef pieces stir-fried with aromatic spices, green chilies, and curry leaves.
items.simplified_description: Stir-fried beef with spices and chilies.

items.name: Chatti Meen Curry
items.description: Tender fish fillets simmered in a rich, spiced coconut curry with onions, tomatoes, and curry leaves.
items.simplified_description: Fish cooked in a spicy coconut curry.

items.name: Masala Dosa
items.description: Crisp, savory crepe filled with spiced potatoes and onions. A South Indian delicacy.
items.simplified_description: A crispy crepe filled with spiced potatoes.

items.name: Mutton Biriyani
items.description: Rich, slow-cooked delicacy made with tender mutton, lentils, and broken wheat, blended into a smooth, hearty paste. Infused with aromatic spices and garnished with fried onions, mint, and lemon, it offers a perfect balance of flavor and tradition in every bite.
items.simplified_description: A rich rice dish with slow-cooked mutton and spices.

items.name: Vizhinjam Chicken Fry
items.description: Marinated chicken pieces, deeply fried with a blend of Vizhinjam coastal spices, typically includes curry leaves and regional herbs.
items.simplified_description: Fried chicken marinated with coastal spices.

items.name: Lamb Seekh Kabab mandi
items.description: A rich and hearty Arabian classic, our Lamb Seekh Kabab Mandi features succulent lamb seekh kababs served over fragrant, spiced mandi rice. Slow-cooked to perfection with traditional herbs and spices, this dish offers a perfect blend of smoky flavor, tender meat, and irresistible aroma in every bite.
items.simplified_description: Lamb kababs served with spiced rice.

items.name: Authentic Hyderabadi Mutton Haleem
items.description: Rich, slow-cooked delicacy made with tender mutton, lentils, and broken wheat, blended into a smooth, hearty paste. Infused with aromatic spices and garnished with fried onions, mint, and lemon, it offers a perfect balance of flavor and tradition in every bite.
items.simplified_description: A smooth, hearty dish made with mutton and lentils.
